evidence_summary: To establish the aftermath of the action and transition into a state of isolation and uncertainty.

After the crash, Carter is left flying a damaged machine without navigation tools. He spends six hours flying over the desolate dead sea bottom, realizing he is lost as the cities he passes do not match the architecture of Helium.
lonely shots of the machine against a vast landscape
